history.content:
<thought>
I am at row02 colB facing right. The cell directly in front is lava at (2,C), so I cannot move forward. I need to go down to (3,B) which is safe. To face down, I should turn right (clockwise).
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at (2,B) facing down. The cell directly ahead (3,B) is empty floor. Moving forward is safe and gets me closer to the goal at (4,D) by going down first.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (3,B) facing down. The cell directly ahead (4,B) is floor, but reaching the goal at (4,D) requires going east, but (4,C) is lava. Instead, I should go right first to (3,C) and then to (3,D) before going down to the goal. To face right, I need to turn left from facing down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at (3,B) facing right. The cell ahead (3,C) is floor, safe to move. That will get me closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (3,C) facing right. The cell ahead (3,D) is floor, safe to move. After that, I can turn down and go to the goal at (4,D).
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (3,D) facing right. I need to go down to reach the goal at (4,D). Turning right will make me face down. Then I can move forward onto the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at (3,D) facing down. The cell directly in front is the goal (4,D). Moving forward will reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
